prompt:
Ultra-photorealistic high-fashion studio editorial featuring a stunning young woman and a handsome young man posing together in a luxury photography studio. They stand side by side with effortless chemistry, projecting confidence, elegance, and modern sophistication.
The woman has long, voluminous dark brown wavy hair, glowing skin, captivating hazel-green eyes, and wears subtle luxury editorial makeup. She is dressed in a perfectly tailored closed black blazer with matching high-waisted tailored trousers, complemented by bold round gold statement earrings, a refined gold bracelet, and sleek black pointed heels.
The man has thick, styled dark hair, defined facial features, warm hazel-brown eyes, and light stubble. He wears a matching closed black tailored blazer with a black dress shirt underneath, tailored black trousers, polished black leather dress shoes, and a premium stainless-steel wristwatch.
Their poses feel natural and editorial: the man stands slightly behind and beside the woman with one hand in his pocket while the woman confidently crosses one leg in front of the other with relaxed shoulders. Both look directly into the camera with calm, confident expressions, creating the feel of a luxury fashion campaign.
Shot inside a premium photography studio with a seamless charcoal-gray backdrop, dramatic yet soft key lighting, subtle rim lighting for separation, soft shadows, and flawless skin tones. Minimalist composition with no props, keeping the focus entirely on the models. Captured on a full-frame DSLR with an 85mm lens, f/1.8, shallow depth of field, razor-sharp focus on both faces, cinematic color grading, premium Vogue editorial aesthetic, ultra-detailed textures, realistic fabric folds, natural skin pores, and 8K ultra-photorealistic quality.
promptEn:
Ultra-photorealistic high-fashion studio editorial featuring a stunning young woman and a handsome young man posing together in a luxury photography studio. They stand side by side with effortless chemistry, projecting confidence, elegance, and modern sophistication.
The woman has long, voluminous dark brown wavy hair, glowing skin, captivating hazel-green eyes, and wears subtle luxury editorial makeup. She is dressed in a perfectly tailored closed black blazer with matching high-waisted tailored trousers, complemented by bold round gold statement earrings, a refined gold bracelet, and sleek black pointed heels.
The man has thick, styled dark hair, defined facial features, warm hazel-brown eyes, and light stubble. He wears a matching closed black tailored blazer with a black dress shirt underneath, tailored black trousers, polished black leather dress shoes, and a premium stainless-steel wristwatch.
Their poses feel natural and editorial: the man stands slightly behind and beside the woman with one hand in his pocket while the woman confidently crosses one leg in front of the other with relaxed shoulders. Both look directly into the camera with calm, confident expressions, creating the feel of a luxury fashion campaign.
Shot inside a premium photography studio with a seamless charcoal-gray backdrop, dramatic yet soft key lighting, subtle rim lighting for separation, soft shadows, and flawless skin tones. Minimalist composition with no props, keeping the focus entirely on the models. Captured on a full-frame DSLR with an 85mm lens, f/1.8, shallow depth of field, razor-sharp focus on both faces, cinematic color grading, premium Vogue editorial aesthetic, ultra-detailed textures, realistic fabric folds, natural skin pores, and 8K ultra-photorealistic quality.
promptZh:
超写实高定时尚摄影棚大片，展现了一位迷人的年轻女性与一位英俊的年轻男性在奢华摄影棚中共同拍摄的场景。他们并肩站立，展现出自然默契的化学反应，流露出自信、优雅与现代感。
女性留着浓密且富有质感的 深棕色 波浪卷发，皮肤光泽透亮，拥有一双迷人的榛绿色眼睛，妆容精致且具有高级感。她身着剪裁完美的黑色修身西装外套，搭配同色系高腰西裤，佩戴夸张的圆形金色耳环、精致的金手镯，脚踩黑色尖头高跟鞋。
男性留着浓密且经过精心打理的深色短发，面部轮廓分明，拥有一双温暖的榛棕色眼睛，留着淡淡的胡茬。他身着同款黑色修身西装外套，内搭黑色衬衫，搭配剪裁得体的黑色西裤、抛光黑色皮鞋，并佩戴一块高端不锈钢腕表。
两人的姿势自然且具有大片感：男性站在女性身后侧方，单手插兜；女性自信地将一条腿交叉在另一条腿前，双肩放松。两人直视镜头，表情冷静而自信，营造出奢华时尚广告的氛围。
拍摄于高端摄影棚内，背景为无缝的 炭灰色 背景布，采用戏剧性且柔和的主光照明，辅以微妙的轮廓光以增加层次感，阴影柔和，肤色完美。构图极简，无任何道具，将焦点完全集中在模特身上。使用全画幅单反相机搭配 85mm 镜头拍摄，f/1.8 大光圈，浅景深，面部焦点极其锐利，电影级调色，呈现出高端 Vogue 杂志的审美质感，纹理细节丰富，织物褶皱真实，皮肤毛孔清晰可见，具备 8K 超写实画质。
